title: eupatorium vauthierianum var. ramosissimum
intro: Eupatorium vauthierianum var. ramosissimum, also known as White Snakeroot, is a plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) native to North America. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of White Snakeroot include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. White Snakeroot is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it can also be dried and used in herbal blends.
